records.ety: [OE. mencioun, F. mention, L. mentio, from the root of meminisse to remember. See Mind.]

defs: A speaking or notice of anything, -- usually in a brief or cursory manner. Used especially in the phrase to make mention of.
quotes: I will make mention of thy righteousness.
And sleep in dull, cold marble, where no mention Of me more must be heard of.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Mentioned (mn"shnd); p. pr. & vb. n. Mentioning.]

defs: To make mention of; to speak briefly of; to name.
quotes: I will mention the loving-kindnesses of the Lord.
